<html><head><meta name="color-scheme" content="light dark"></head><body><pre style="word-wrap: break-word; white-space: pre-wrap;">"""Editorial Layer workflow for multi-stage LLM deliberation.

This script runs a three-stage editorial judgment system:
1) Executive Editor (EE) models individually draft versions of the news narrative.
2) The same EE models anonymously rank those drafts.
3) An Editor-in-Chief (EIC) model synthesizes the final news narrative.

Each run writes a new row to SQLite so the full history is preserved.
"""

from __future__ import annotations

import asyncio
import json
import logging
import os
import re
import uuid
from dataclasses import dataclass
from datetime import datetime, timezone
from typing import Any

import httpx
from dotenv import load_dotenv
from rich.logging import RichHandler

from config import (
    STAGE1_PROMPT,
    STAGE2_PROMPT,
    STAGE3_LANGUAGE,
    STAGE3_PROMPT,
    date_window,
    get_ee_models,
    get_eic_model,
)
import db

LOGGER = logging.getLogger(__name__)

@dataclass(frozen=True)
class OpenRouterUsage:
    """Usage metadata returned from an OpenRouter completion call."""

    prompt_tokens: int | None
    completion_tokens: int | None
    total_tokens: int | None
    cost: float | None


@dataclass
class UsageTotals:
    """Accumulator for usage totals across model calls."""

    prompt_tokens: int = 0
    completion_tokens: int = 0
    total_tokens: int = 0
    cost: float | None = None

    def add(self, usage: OpenRouterUsage) -> None:
        """Add token and cost usage into the running totals."""

        if usage.prompt_tokens is not None:
            self.prompt_tokens += usage.prompt_tokens
        if usage.completion_tokens is not None:
            self.completion_tokens += usage.completion_tokens
        if usage.total_tokens is not None:
            self.total_tokens += usage.total_tokens
        if usage.cost is not None:
            self.cost = usage.cost if self.cost is None else self.cost + usage.cost


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class Stage1Response:
    """Structured result for a stage 1 model response."""

    model: str
    content: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class Stage2Ranking:
    """Structured result for a stage 2 ranking response."""

    model: str
    raw_text: str
    parsed_labels: list[str]
    parsed_models: list[str]
    valid: bool


def configure_logging() -> None:
    """Configure basic logging for CLI/local runs."""

    logging.basicConfig(
        level=logging.INFO,
        format="%(message)s",
        handlers=[
            RichHandler(
                rich_tracebacks=True,
                show_path=False,
                markup=True,
                show_time=False,
            )
        ],
    )
    logging.getLogger("httpx").setLevel(logging.WARNING)
    logging.getLogger("httpcore").setLevel(logging.WARNING)


def build_openrouter_headers(api_key: str) -> dict[str, str]:
    """Return the HTTP headers required to call the OpenRouter API."""

    return {
        "Authorization": f"Bearer {api_key}",
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
        # Optional metadata headers help OpenRouter track traffic sources.
        "HTTP-Referer": "https://news-editor-agent.local",
        "X-Title": "News Editor Agent",
    }


def build_articles_payload(items: list[dict[str, Any]]) -> str:
    """Format article metadata into a compact prompt-friendly payload."""

    lines: list[str] = []
    for index, item in enumerate(items, start=1):
        title = item.get("title") or "Untitled"
        content = item.get("content_markdown") or ""
        lines.append(
            "\n".join(
                [
                    f"Article {index}:",
                    f"Title: {title}",
                    f"Content: {content}",
                ]
            )
        )
    return "\n\n".join(lines)


def _coerce_cost(value: Any) -> float | None:
    if value is None:
        return None
    try:
        return float(value)
    except (TypeError, ValueError):
        return None


def extract_openrouter_usage(payload: dict[str, Any], headers: httpx.Headers) -> OpenRouterUsage:
    """Extract usage metadata and cost details from OpenRouter responses."""

    usage = payload.get("usage") if isinstance(payload.get("usage"), dict) else None
    prompt_tokens = usage.get("prompt_tokens") if usage else None
    completion_tokens = usage.get("completion_tokens") if usage else None
    total_tokens = usage.get("total_tokens") if usage else None
    cost = _coerce_cost(
        (usage or {}).get("total_cost")
        or (usage or {}).get("cost")
        or payload.get("cost")
    )
    if cost is None:
        for header_name in (
            "x-request-cost",
            "x-request-total-cost",
            "x-openrouter-cost",
            "x-usage-cost",
        ):
            cost = _coerce_cost(headers.get(header_name))
            if cost is not None:
                break
    return OpenRouterUsage(
        prompt_tokens=prompt_tokens,
        completion_tokens=completion_tokens,
        total_tokens=total_tokens,
        cost=cost,
    )


async def call_openrouter(
    client: httpx.AsyncClient,
    api_key: str,
    model: str,
    prompt: str,
    temperature: float = 0.0,
) -> tuple[str, OpenRouterUsage]:
    """Send a prompt to OpenRouter and return the model response text and usage."""

    response = await client.post(
        "https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions",
        headers=build_openrouter_headers(api_key),
        json={
            "model": model,
            "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": prompt}],
            "temperature": temperature,
        },
        timeout=60.0,
    )
    try:
        response.raise_for_status()
    except httpx.HTTPStatusError as exc:
        detail = response.text.strip() or "No response body returned."
        raise RuntimeError(
            f"OpenRouter request failed for {model} "
            f"(status {response.status_code}): {detail}"
        ) from exc
    payload = response.json()
    choices = payload.get("choices") or []
    if not choices:
        LOGGER.error("OpenRouter error for %s: %s", model, json.dumps(payload))
        raise RuntimeError(f"No completion choices returned for {model}.")
    content = choices[0].get("message", {}).get("content")
    if not content:
        LOGGER.error("OpenRouter empty content for %s: %s", model, json.dumps(payload))
        raise RuntimeError(f"Empty completion content returned for {model}.")
    usage = extract_openrouter_usage(payload, response.headers)
    return str(content).strip(), usage


async def run_stage1(
    client: httpx.AsyncClient,
    api_key: str,
    models: list[str],
    articles_payload: str,
) -> tuple[list[Stage1Response], list[OpenRouterUsage]]:
    """Run Stage 1 across all Executive Editor models in parallel."""

    prompt = f"{STAGE1_PROMPT}\n\nARTICLES:\n{articles_payload}"

    async def _run_model(model: str) -> tuple[Stage1Response, OpenRouterUsage] | None:
        try:
            content, usage = await call_openrouter(client, api_key, model, prompt)
        except (httpx.HTTPError, RuntimeError) as exc:
            LOGGER.warning("Stage 1 failed for %s: %s", model, exc)
            return None
        return Stage1Response(model=model, content=content), usage

    responses = await asyncio.gather(*[_run_model(model) for model in models])
    stage1_responses: list[Stage1Response] = []
    usage_items: list[OpenRouterUsage] = []
    for response in responses:
        if response is None:
            continue
        stage1_response, usage = response
        stage1_responses.append(stage1_response)
        usage_items.append(usage)
    return stage1_responses, usage_items


def build_anonymized_responses(
    responses: list[Stage1Response],
) -> tuple[list[str], dict[str, str]]:
    """Assign anonymized labels to Stage 1 drafts."""

    labels = []
    mapping: dict[str, str] = {}
    for index, response in enumerate(responses):
        label = f"Response {chr(ord('A') + index)}"
        labels.append(label)
        mapping[label] = response.model
    return labels, mapping


def build_stage2_prompt(labels: list[str], responses: list[Stage1Response]) -> str:
    """Compose the Stage 2 prompt with anonymized drafts."""

    blocks = []
    for label, response in zip(labels, responses, strict=True):
        blocks.append(f"{label}:\n{response.content}")
    responses_blob = "\n\n".join(blocks)
    return f"{STAGE2_PROMPT}\n\nRESPONSES:\n{responses_blob}"


def parse_ranking(text: str, labels: list[str]) -> list[str] | None:
    """Parse the ranking format into a list of labels.

    Tries to find 'FINAL RANKING:' and then extracts labels from lines like '1. Response A'.
    It is robust to 'Line X:' prefixes and extra text.
    """

    lines = [line.strip() for line in text.splitlines() if line.strip()]

    # Look for the start marker, potentially with a prefix (e.g., "Line 1: FINAL RANKING:")
    start_index = -1
    for i, line in enumerate(lines):
        if "FINAL RANKING:" in line:
            start_index = i + 1
            break

    if start_index == -1:
        return None

    parsed: list[str] = []
    # Regex to find "Response X" possibly preceded by "1." or "Line Y: 1."
    # It matches "Response " followed by a label from our list.
    label_pattern = rf"({'|'.join(re.escape(label) for label in labels)})"

    for line in lines[start_index:]:
        match = re.search(label_pattern, line)
        if match:
            label = match.group(1)
            if label not in parsed:
                parsed.append(label)

        if len(parsed) == len(labels):
            break

    if len(parsed) != len(labels):
        return None

    return parsed


async def run_stage2(
    client: httpx.AsyncClient,
    api_key: str,
    models: list[str],
    labels: list[str],
    responses: list[Stage1Response],
    label_to_model: dict[str, str],
) -> tuple[list[Stage2Ranking], list[OpenRouterUsage]]:
    """Run Stage 2 ranking across Executive Editor models in parallel."""

    prompt = build_stage2_prompt(labels, responses)

    async def _run_model(model: str) -> tuple[Stage2Ranking, OpenRouterUsage] | None:
        try:
            content, usage = await call_openrouter(client, api_key, model, prompt, temperature=0.0)
        except (httpx.HTTPError, RuntimeError) as exc:
            LOGGER.warning("Stage 2 failed for %s: %s", model, exc)
            return None
        parsed_labels = parse_ranking(content, labels)
        if parsed_labels is None:
            LOGGER.warning("Stage 2 response from %s failed parsing.", model)
            return (
                Stage2Ranking(
                    model=model,
                    raw_text=content,
                    parsed_labels=[],
                    parsed_models=[],
                    valid=False,
                ),
                usage,
            )
        parsed_models = [label_to_model[label] for label in parsed_labels]
        return (
            Stage2Ranking(
                model=model,
                raw_text=content,
                parsed_labels=parsed_labels,
                parsed_models=parsed_models,
                valid=True,
            ),
            usage,
        )

    rankings = await asyncio.gather(*[_run_model(model) for model in models])
    stage2_rankings: list[Stage2Ranking] = []
    usage_items: list[OpenRouterUsage] = []
    for ranking in rankings:
        if ranking is None:
            continue
        stage2_ranking, usage = ranking
        stage2_rankings.append(stage2_ranking)
        usage_items.append(usage)
    return stage2_rankings, usage_items


def compute_average_ranks(rankings: list[Stage2Ranking]) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
    """Compute average rank positions across all valid Stage 2 rankings."""

    totals: dict[str, dict[str, float]] = {}
    for ranking in rankings:
        if not ranking.valid:
            continue
        for position, model in enumerate(ranking.parsed_models, start=1):
            entry = totals.setdefault(model, {"sum": 0.0, "votes": 0.0})
            entry["sum"] += position
            entry["votes"] += 1.0
    averages = []
    for model, stats in totals.items():
        votes = stats["votes"]
        averages.append(
            {
                "model": model,
                "average_rank": stats["sum"] / votes if votes else None,
                "votes": int(votes),
            }
        )
    return sorted(averages, key=lambda item: (item["average_rank"] or 999.0, item["model"]))


def build_stage3_prompt(
    stage1_responses: list[Stage1Response],
    average_ranks: list[dict[str, Any]],
    rankings: list[Stage2Ranking],
    language: str,
) -> str:
    """Compose the Stage 3 prompt with full context."""

    stage1_blocks = []
    for response in stage1_responses:
        stage1_blocks.append(f"Model: {response.model}\n{response.content}")
    ranking_blocks = []
    for ranking in rankings:
        ranking_blocks.append(
            "\n".join(
                [
                    f"Ranking Model: {ranking.model}",
                    f"Valid: {ranking.valid}",
                    f"Parsed Models: {', '.join(ranking.parsed_models) if ranking.parsed_models else 'N/A'}",
                    "Raw Output:",
                    ranking.raw_text,
                ]
            )
        )
    stage1_blob = "\n\n".join(stage1_blocks)
    ranking_blob = "\n\n".join(ranking_blocks)
    averages_blob = json.dumps(average_ranks, indent=2)
    return (
        f"{STAGE3_PROMPT}\n"
        f"Write response in {language}.\n\n"
        "EXECUTIVE EDITOR RESPONSES:\n"
        f"{stage1_blob}\n\n"
        "STAGE 2 RANKINGS:\n"
        f"{ranking_blob}\n\n"
        "AVERAGE RANKS (BEST TO WORST):\n"
        f"{averages_blob}"
    )


async def create_run_record(
    stage1_responses: list[Stage1Response],
    ee_models: list[str],
    window_start: datetime,
    window_end: datetime,
    article_count: int,
) -> str:
    """Insert the initial run record into SQLite and return the row ID."""

    run_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
    payload = {
        "id": run_id,
        "stage1_responses": json.dumps([{"model": item.model, "content": item.content} for item in stage1_responses]),
        "stage1_models": json.dumps(ee_models),
        "article_count": article_count,
        "article_window_start": window_start.isoformat(),
        "article_window_end": window_end.isoformat(),
        "stage1_completed_at": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
    }

    async with db.get_async_db() as conn:
        await conn.execute(
            """
            INSERT INTO editorial_runs (
                id, stage1_responses, stage1_models, article_count,
                article_window_start, article_window_end, stage1_completed_at
            ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
            """,
            (
                payload["id"],
                payload["stage1_responses"],
                payload["stage1_models"],
                payload["article_count"],
                payload["article_window_start"],
                payload["article_window_end"],
                payload["stage1_completed_at"],
            )
        )
        await conn.commit()
    return run_id


async def update_run_record(
    run_id: str,
    payload: dict[str, Any],
) -> None:
    """Update a run record with Stage 2 or Stage 3 outputs."""

    fields = []
    values = []
    for key, value in payload.items():
        fields.append(f"{key} = ?")
        if isinstance(value, (dict, list)):
            values.append(json.dumps(value))
        else:
            values.append(value)

    values.append(run_id)
    query = f"UPDATE editorial_runs SET {', '.join(fields)} WHERE id = ?"

    async with db.get_async_db() as conn:
        await conn.execute(query, values)
        await conn.commit()


async def fetch_recent_articles() -> list[dict[str, Any]]:
    """Load articles in the configured date window for editorial use."""

    window_start, window_end = date_window()
    async with db.get_async_db() as conn:
        cursor = await conn.execute(
            """
            SELECT id, title, url, summary, content_markdown, published_at
            FROM rss_items
            WHERE published_at >= ? AND published_at <= ?
            ORDER BY published_at DESC
            """,
            (window_start.isoformat(), window_end.isoformat())
        )
        rows = await cursor.fetchall()
        return [dict(row) for row in rows]


async def run_editorial_workflow() -> str | None:
    """Run the 3-stage Editorial Layer workflow and return the final narrative."""

    configure_logging()
    LOGGER.info("[bold]Starting editorial layer.[/bold]")

    load_dotenv()
    api_key = os.getenv("OPENROUTER_API_KEY", "")
    stage3_language = STAGE3_LANGUAGE
    if not api_key:
        raise RuntimeError("OPENROUTER_API_KEY must be set in the environment.")

    articles = await fetch_recent_articles()
    if not articles:
        LOGGER.warning("No articles found in the date window; aborting workflow.")
        return None

    window_start, window_end = date_window()
    articles_payload = build_articles_payload(articles)
    ee_models = get_ee_models()
    eic_model = get_eic_model()
    start_time = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
    usage_totals = UsageTotals()

    async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
        LOGGER.info("Stage 1: Running Executive Editor workflow.")
        stage1_responses, stage1_usage = await run_stage1(client, api_key, ee_models, articles_payload)

        if not stage1_responses:
            LOGGER.warning("No Stage 1 responses succeeded; aborting workflow.")
            return None
        stage1_totals = UsageTotals()
        for usage in stage1_usage:
            usage_totals.add(usage)
            stage1_totals.add(usage)

        run_id = await create_run_record(
            stage1_responses=stage1_responses,
            ee_models=ee_models,
            window_start=window_start,
            window_end=window_end,
            article_count=len(articles),
        )

        labels, label_to_model = build_anonymized_responses(stage1_responses)
        LOGGER.info("Stage 2: Running Ranking workflow.")
        stage2_rankings, stage2_usage = await run_stage2(
            client=client,
            api_key=api_key,
            models=ee_models,
            labels=labels,
            responses=stage1_responses,
            label_to_model=label_to_model,
        )
        stage2_totals = UsageTotals()
        for usage in stage2_usage:
            usage_totals.add(usage)
            stage2_totals.add(usage)
        average_ranks = compute_average_ranks(stage2_rankings)

        await update_run_record(
            run_id,
            {
                "stage2_rankings": {
                    "label_mapping": label_to_model,
                    "rankings": [
                        {
                            "model": ranking.model,
                            "raw_text": ranking.raw_text,
                            "parsed_labels": ranking.parsed_labels,
                            "parsed_models": ranking.parsed_models,
                            "valid": ranking.valid,
                        }
                        for ranking in stage2_rankings
                    ],
                },
                "stage2_average_ranks": average_ranks,
                "stage2_models": ee_models,
                "stage2_completed_at": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
            },
        )

        stage3_prompt = build_stage3_prompt(
            stage1_responses,
            average_ranks,
            stage2_rankings,
            stage3_language,
        )
        LOGGER.info("Stage 3: Running Editor-in-Chief workflow.")
        stage3_text, stage3_usage = await call_openrouter(
            client,
            api_key,
            eic_model,
            stage3_prompt,
            temperature=0.0,
        )
        usage_totals.add(stage3_usage)
        stage3_totals = UsageTotals()
        stage3_totals.add(stage3_usage)

        await update_run_record(
            run_id,
            {
                "stage3_response": stage3_text.strip(),
                "stage3_model": eic_model,
                "stage3_completed_at": datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat(),
            },
        )

    elapsed_seconds = (datetime.now(timezone.utc) - start_time).total_seconds()
    LOGGER.info("[bold green]Editorial layer completed successfully.[/bold green]")
    def format_cost(value: float | None) -> str:
        return f"${value:.3f}" if value is not None else "N/A"

    def format_tokens(value: int | None) -> str:
        return f"{value:,}" if value is not None else "N/A"

    cost_display = format_cost(usage_totals.cost)
    stage1_cost = format_cost(stage1_totals.cost)
    stage2_cost = format_cost(stage2_totals.cost)
    stage3_cost = format_cost(stage3_totals.cost)
    LOGGER.info(
        "Editorial layer summary:\n"
        "Executive Editor drafts: %s (tokens: %s, cost: %s)\n"
        "Peer rankings: %s (tokens: %s, cost: %s)\n"
        "Editor-in-Chief synthesis: 1 (tokens: %s, cost: %s)\n"
        "Tokens: %s total (input: %s, output: %s)\n"
        "Cost & running time: %s over %.2f seconds",
        len(stage1_responses),
        format_tokens(stage1_totals.total_tokens),
        stage1_cost,
        len(stage2_rankings),
        format_tokens(stage2_totals.total_tokens),
        stage2_cost,
        format_tokens(stage3_totals.total_tokens),
        stage3_cost,
        format_tokens(usage_totals.total_tokens),
        format_tokens(usage_totals.prompt_tokens),
        format_tokens(usage_totals.completion_tokens),
        cost_display,
        elapsed_seconds,
    )
    return stage3_text.strip()


def main() -> None:
    """Entrypoint for running the Editorial Layer workflow."""

    asyncio.run(run_editorial_workflow())


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
</pre></body></html>
